final_choice.row_label: Amortization of Capitalized Research & Development in Cost of Revenues

variables.notes: Selected only the D&A row explicitly identified as being in Cost of Revenues. Excluded broader or ambiguous D&A rows to avoid misallocating SG&A or mixed operating depreciation to COGS.
